title: rubus × crassiramus
intro: Rubus × crassiramus, also known as the hybrid blackberry or hybrid raspberry, is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus occidentalis, resulting in a thorny shrub with edible fruits. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including diarrhea, inflammation, and wounds. The health benefits of Rubus × crassiramus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage, reduce the risk of chronic diseases, and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Rubus × crassiramus can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
